title: Leperiza latifolia
uses: Leperiza latifolia has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues. However, information on its specific uses is limited and requires further research. Some sources suggest that it may have anti-inflammatory properties, which could be beneficial in reducing swelling and pain. Additionally, its leaves and roots are sometimes used to make tea, which is believed to have antioxidant properties. Leperiza latifolia is also said to have antimicrobial properties, which could aid in the treatment of infections.
